content:
# Entity: Andrew J. Pigors

**Role:** Plaintiff (Pro Se) in ALL cases
**Address:** 1977 Whitehall Rd, Lot 17, Laketon Township, MI 49445 (NOT Muskegon)
**Child:** Lincoln David Watson (L.D.W.) — use initials per MCR 8.119(H)
**Status:** Pro se litigant, 3 jobs lost due to litigation, $1,056.60/mo child support, 569+ days denied parenting time, 59 days jailed
**Total Cases:** 8 jurisdictions, 19 defendants
**Total Damages Sought:** $3.4M–$22.9M
**Best Interest Score:** Andrew 97 vs Emily 44 (11/12 factors favor Andrew)
**Key Strengths:** Extensive documentation (305 interference incidents, photos, journal, police reports), strong legal research, systematic evidence collection
